nodes.id: document:BIPV_Codex_Edition/companion/reference/The 20% of BIPV design that gives you the other 80%.md
nodes.name: The 20% of BIPV design that gives you the other 80%.md
nodes.filePath: BIPV_Codex_Edition/companion/reference/The 20% of BIPV design that gives you the other 80%.md
nodes.summary: Covers: The 20% of BIPV design that gives you the other 80%; 1. Learn BIPV as a **building-envelope problem with an electrical subsystem**; 2. Start with **building load reduction and architectural function**, not module count; 3. Master **solar geometry, partial shading, and irradiance mapping**; 4. Treat **temperature and heat rejection** as first-order, not secondary; 5. Learn **electrical partitioning and MPPT architecture** from the shading map.

tour.title: Start With Root Authority
tour.description: Use root instructions and current state before making PVplant claims.

tour.title: Use Canonical Knowledge
tour.description: Read the canonical iWin knowledge base and source map before following older reports.

tour.title: Close Assumptions And Standards Gates
tour.description: Use the assumption register and design envelope before treating topology scores as final.

tour.title: Review Current Decision Evidence
tour.description: Use decision matrices and evidence tables as conditional architecture evidence.

tour.title: Vendor Closure Path
tour.description: Use the questionnaire, matrix, and rubric to turn vendor-data-required gaps into closure evidence.

tour.title: Source Loading Boundary
tour.description: Use the source manifest and literature inventory to decide when to open a separate evidence-source graph.
